tldr: Igor Arrieta took UAE's second stage win in two days in a rain-affected hilly stage to Potenza, beating Afonso Eulálio in a small front-group finale. Eulálio's second place plus stage 4 lead time gave him the pink jersey going into the Naples sprint stage.

narrative.headline: Arrieta wins the rain-stage; Eulálio into pink
narrative.body: ~203 km from Praia a Mare to Potenza, hilly with rain-affected chaos from the start of the stage. The race settled into a small front-group finale that Arrieta won; Eulálio rolled in second, Scaroni third.

gcImpact.headline: Afonso Eulálio in pink
gcImpact.body: The Portuguese climber's second place plus accumulated GC lead from the Bulgarian opening puts him in the maglia rosa.
